description: HIPRT correctness matrix across v0.9 target workloads

results.message: HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `point_in_polygon`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 2D geometry expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `overlay_compose`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 2D geometry expansion. No CPU fallback is used.

HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `segment_polygon_hitcount`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 2D geometry expansion. No CPU fallback is used.

HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `segment_polygon_anyhit_rows`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 2D geometry expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `point_nearest_segment`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 2D geometry expansion. No CPU fallback is used.

HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `fixed_radius_neighbors`, but only Point3DLayout fixed-radius inputs are implemented today; implementation is tracked under Goal 548 for 3D, Goal 550 for 2D. No CPU fallback is used.

HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `knn_rows`, but only Point3DLayout nearest-neighbor inputs are implemented today; implementation is tracked under Goal 549 for 3D, Goal 550 for 2D. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `bfs_discover`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 graph expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `triangle_match`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 550 graph expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `conjunctive_scan`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 551 DB expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `grouped_count`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 551 DB expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
HIPRT v0.9 API skeleton recognizes `grouped_sum`, but that workload family is not implemented yet; implementation is tracked under Goal 551 DB expansion. No CPU fallback is used.
